payload.answer: This looks additive: the new fact can coexist with the existing one. I’m not updating memory here; here are safe choices for how to handle it.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
New: Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins.
repair_options: add_new: add the Sonny Rollins preference as a separate fact alongside Bill Evans
keep_existing: leave the current memory unchanged
edit: revise the existing memory if the Bill Evans fact should be adjusted
